call_to_action_ranked_subtitle: Share your best recipes and gain experience to level up
call_to_action_first_place_subtitle: If you reach the first position, you can request your free verification
forgot_password_desc: If you have forgotten your password, you can reset it here. We just need your email address.
reset_link_sent_desc: Check your email to reset your password.
link_expired_or_used: The link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new reset link.

event_not_found_message: The event you're looking for could not be found.

recipe_of_the_month_voting: Vote for the Recipe of the Month

delete_account_warning: This action cannot be undone. All your recipes and data will be permanently deleted.
password_requirements: Password must be at least 6 characters long
password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
new_password_must_be_different: New password must be different from current password
about_subtitle: Learn more about Jorbites and our mission
blog_description: Food articles, tips and Jorbites news
blog_not_found_message: The blog post you're looking for could not be found.
blog_contribute_title: Want to publish on our blog?
blog_contribute_subtitle: If you're a Jorbiter and want to share your culinary story or article, contact us via email and send your contribution.
why_jorbites_description: A user posted this recipe that indirectly answers the question:
jorbites_description: Jorbites is a vibrant community platform where food enthusiasts from around the world come together to share their culinary creations, discover new recipes, and connect with fellow food lovers.
jorbites_mission: Our mission is to make cooking more accessible, fun, and social by providing a space where everyone can contribute their unique recipes and learn from others.
share_recipes_description: Upload your favorite recipes with step-by-step instructions, ingredients, and beautiful photos.
discover_recipes_description: Explore thousands of recipes from our community, filter by category, and find your next culinary adventure.
level_system_description: Gain experience by sharing recipes and engaging with the community. Level up to unlock achievements and recognition.
community_description: Connect with other food enthusiasts, leave comments, and build relationships through shared culinary experiences.
architecture_description: Jorbites follows a modern microservices architecture for scalability and performance, overcoming serverless limitations with specialized services.
developer_description: Jorbites was created with passion for both technology and culinary arts. Built using modern web technologies to provide the best user experience possible.
get_started_description: Ready to join our culinary community? Start exploring recipes or create your account to begin sharing your own creations.
no_search_results_subtitle: Try searching with different keywords or check your spelling.
no_search_category_results: Try removing the category filter or changing your search terms.
invalid_youtube_url: Please enter a valid YouTube URL (e.g., https://youtube.com/watch?v=..., https://youtu.be/... or https://youtube.com/shorts/...)
private_workshop_message: This is a private workshop and you are not invited.
price_description: Set a price for your workshop, or leave it at 0 for a free event.
ingredients_description: List any ingredients that participants need to bring.
previous_steps_description: Steps participants should complete before the workshop
workshop_whitelist_description: Select users who can join this private workshop
not_invited: You are not invited to this workshop
workshop_description_subtitle: Describe what participants will learn and create
workshop_image_subtitle: Upload an image for your workshop
workshops_description: Discover and join cooking workshops in your area
check_back_later: Check back later for upcoming workshops
check_back_later_past: There are no past workshops to show
contribute_to_community: Do you want to contribute to the community sharing your knowledge?
share_cooking_skills: Share your cooking skills and help others learn new recipes and techniques.
paste_ingredients_help: Paste your ingredients list here (one per line, with or without numbers/bullets)
paste_steps_help: Paste your recipe steps here (one per line, with or without numbers/bullets)

2. Mix dry ingredients

no_recipes_yet: No recipes have been submitted yet
request_recipe_subtitle: Tell the community what recipe you'd like to see
title_max_length: Title must be less than 200 characters
description_max_length: Description must be less than 1000 characters
quest_description_placeholder: Describe what recipe you're looking for in detail...
chefs_subtitle: Discover talented chefs and their creations
no_chefs_description: Try adjusting your search or filters

list_no_recipes: This list has no recipes yet.
add_to_list_description: Select the list where you want to add this recipe
delete_list_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this list?
recipe_book_no_recipes: You have no recipes to generate a book.

plan_is_public: This plan is public and shared with the community.
plan_is_private: This plan is private and only visible to you.
meal_planner_subtitle: Design, customize, and share your week diets with the community.
calendar_export_description: Export this weekly plan to a .ics file that can be imported directly into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Microsoft Outlook.
type_to_search: Type at least 2 characters to search
max_recipes_per_meal_reached: Maximum of 4 recipes per meal allowed
pin_limit_reached: You can only pin up to 4 recipes
courses_description: Learn how to get the most out of Jorbites, earn certificates, and level up your community skills.
contest_manager_description: Learn how to organize, manage, and host cooking contests with your community in Jorbites.
course_jorbites_basics_desc: Learn how to set up your profile, find recipes, and interact with other community chefs.
course_recipe_creator_desc: Master formatting, ingredient listings, uploading beautiful food photos, and publishing high-quality cooking guides.
course_meal_planner_desc: Learn how to build, organize, and export customized weekly meal plans for you and your family.
course_recipe_book_builder_desc: Discover how to compile your favorite cooking recipes, design layouts, and export your personal recipe book PDF.
course_community_events_desc: Explore the events system: contest types, calendar syncing, challenge of the week participation, and voting protocols.
course_recipe_lists_desc: Learn how to organize your culinary ideas, create custom recipe lists, and share them with the community.
course_workshops_desc: Discover how to host workshops, manage student whitelists, request approvals, and join live cooking classes.
pass_message: Congratulations! You passed the test and earned your certificate!
fail_message: You did not achieve the required 80% passing score. Please review the material and try again.
cert_presented_to: This certificate is proudly presented to
cert_description: For successfully completing the "{{courseTitle}}" formation, demonstrating proficiency in organizing and managing community events.

contest_manager_course_details.requirements_intro: To maintain the high quality of events in the Jorbites community, we have established core requirements for organizing contests:
contest_manager_course_details.req_recipes_desc: You must compromise that the participants of the contest will post at least 5 recipes in total during the event.
contest_manager_course_details.req_theme_desc: Define a clear culinary theme (e.g. "Best Homemade Pizza" or "Healthy Autumn Soups") to focus participants.
contest_manager_course_details.req_badge_desc: Every contest needs a unique badge. You can easily generate it using AI (we teach you this in Module 4).
contest_manager_course_details.req_announcement_desc: Prep the dates, times, and gathering details so users know where and when the event is happening.
contest_manager_course_details.checklist_recipes: I compromise that the participants will post at least 5 recipes in total during the contest.
contest_manager_course_details.checklist_theme: I have defined a clear culinary theme for my contest.
contest_manager_course_details.checklist_badge: I know how to design/generate a badge for the event.
contest_manager_course_details.checklist_announcement: I have drafted the contest dates and location description.
contest_manager_course_details.workflow_step1_desc: Contact administrators (email or instagram) with your planned contest theme and confirm you meet the 5-recipe requirement.
contest_manager_course_details.workflow_step2_desc: Once approved, administrators will post your event to the official Jorbites Events calendar so participants can discover it.
contest_manager_course_details.workflow_step3_desc: Share the events page link with your closed circle, friends, and community members.
contest_manager_course_details.workflow_step4_desc: Everyone gathers, preps their ingredients, posts their cooking recipe on the platform, and eats the delicious results together.
contest_manager_course_details.workflow_step5_desc: Once everyone finished eating, participants submit their votes via the Jorbites Google Form template.
contest_manager_course_details.voting_desc1: Voting is conducted via a dedicated Google Form which automatically maps votes to specific participants and recipes.
contest_manager_course_details.voting_desc2: The form link accepts two query parameters to prefill the participant details:
contest_manager_course_details.voting_param_recipe: The URL of the posted recipe (found by clicking the recipe "Share" button).
contest_manager_course_details.voting_param_user: The participant user ID (extracted from their Jorbites profile URL, e.g. /profile/{id}).
contest_manager_course_details.badge_desc1: Contest organizers create stylized badges for winners and participants using AI image generators.
contest_manager_course_details.badge_desc2: By using a consistent vintage cartoon theme, we maintain a beautiful cohesive design language across all events.
contest_manager_course_details.badge_topic_label: What recipe/topic is the contest about? (X)
contest_manager_course_details.contact_desc: Once you have the badge, details, and requirements ready, reach out to the Jorbites admin team. They will verify your requirements (including checking if you have posted at least 5 recipes) and add the contest to the events feed.
contest_manager_course_details.course_description: Complete the 5 lessons and pass the final test to receive your official Jorbites certificate.
contest_manager_course_details.final_test_description: Test your knowledge with 10 random multiple-choice questions. You need at least 80% (8 correct answers) to pass and receive the Contest Manager Certificate.
contest_manager_course_details.enter_certificate_name_desc: Please enter the name you want to appear on the official certificate:

recipe_lists_course_details.course_description: Learn how to organize your culinary ideas, create custom lists, and share them with the community.
recipe_lists_course_details.requirements_intro: Jorbites recipe lists are designed to help you categorize and organize cooking ideas. Before getting started, verify the following basics:
recipe_lists_course_details.req_auto_desc: Every Jorbites user automatically gets a private 'to cook later' list created for them.
recipe_lists_course_details.req_custom_desc: You can create as many lists as you want (e.g. 'Weekend Brunches', 'Favorite Pasta Dishes').
recipe_lists_course_details.req_privacy_desc: Lists can be marked Private (visible only to you) or Public (visible to everyone).
recipe_lists_course_details.req_multi_desc: A recipe can be added to multiple lists simultaneously by toggling them in the list modal.
recipe_lists_course_details.checklist_auto: I understand that 'to cook later' is my default private list.
recipe_lists_course_details.checklist_custom: I know I can create unlimited custom lists to organize recipes.
recipe_lists_course_details.checklist_privacy: I understand the difference between public and private recipe lists.
recipe_lists_course_details.checklist_multi: I know I can toggle a recipe in multiple lists at the same time.
recipe_lists_course_details.workflow_step1_desc: Look for the list plus (+) icon button located on any recipe card or at the top of the recipe page details.
recipe_lists_course_details.workflow_step2_desc: Clicking the icon will open the 'Add to List' modal. If you are not logged in, you will be prompted to sign in first.
recipe_lists_course_details.workflow_step3_desc: Click any existing list inside the modal to add/remove the recipe. Checkmarks indicate the recipe is successfully saved in that list.
recipe_lists_course_details.workflow_step4_desc: Click 'Create custom list' inside the modal to name a new list, select its privacy setting, and save it.
recipe_lists_course_details.workflow_step5_desc: Visit your profile page and click 'Lists' to view all your custom collections.
recipe_lists_course_details.sharing_desc1: To share a collection of recipes, navigate to the specific list page under your profile, check that privacy is set to Public, and copy the URL.
recipe_lists_course_details.sharing_desc2: Shared public list URLs allow other community members to view your compiled list, discover new recipes, and follow your collections.
recipe_lists_course_details.final_test_description: Test your knowledge with 5 multiple-choice questions. You need at least 80% (4 correct answers) to pass and receive the Recipe Lists Certificate.

community_events_course_details.course_description: Explore the events system: contest types, calendar syncing, challenge of the week participation, and voting protocols.
community_events_course_details.overview_intro: Jorbites features dynamic culinary events to connect chefs. Before getting started, verify the following basics:
community_events_course_details.evt_challenge_desc: A weekly prompt encouraging cooking with a specific ingredient or theme. Open to all registered chefs.
community_events_course_details.evt_contest_desc: An event where the participants compete to get the first place, usually winning a badge and sometimes even a physical prize.
community_events_course_details.evt_temp_desc: Temporary events with a main topic where participants during that period can win badges fulfilling the event conditions. Includes recurrent events like '29 of gnocchis'.
community_events_course_details.evt_voting_desc: An automated system replacing Instagram story votes where users vote in-app for the best recipe of the week, month, and year, automatically awarding badges.
community_events_course_details.checklist_challenge: I understand that the Challenge of the Week is thematic and open to all chefs.
community_events_course_details.checklist_contest: I understand that contests are competitions for first place with badges and prizes.
community_events_course_details.checklist_temp: I understand that temporary and recurrent events award badges for fulfilling specific conditions.
community_events_course_details.checklist_voting: I know that winners are chosen through public community voting.
community_events_course_details.challenges_step1_desc: Go to the Events tab and find the 'Weekly Challenge' card to check the current theme or core ingredient.
community_events_course_details.challenges_step2_desc: Create a recipe matching the theme and publish it on Jorbites before the challenge's specified end date.
community_events_course_details.challenges_step3_desc: You do not have to post the link anywhere. A Jorbites organizer will automatically add the challenge of the week badge to your profile if your recipe fulfills the requirements. If not, you can contact Jorbites administrators via Instagram MD or email.
community_events_course_details.voting_desc1: Jorbites automatically curates the top-10 most liked recipes of the previous week, month, or year (requiring at least 4 candidate recipes to open). Once a session is opened, you can vote directly in-app for your favorite recipe during the 24-hour voting window.
community_events_course_details.voting_desc2: When the session closes, the recipe with the highest number of votes is declared the winner (total likes acts as a tie-breaker). The winning author is automatically awarded a corresponding badge on their Jorbites profile.
community_events_course_details.notifications_desc1: The Jorbites Event Calendar provides a unified view of all ongoing, past, and upcoming events so you can plan your kitchen sessions accordingly.
community_events_course_details.notifications_desc2: To keep you updated without overwhelming you, Jorbites sends notifications on: (1) the day a new event begins, (2) when 3 days are left to participate, (3) on Mondays when the new Weekly Challenge theme is announced, and (4) whenever a Recipe of X voting session opens or publishes results.
community_events_course_details.benefits_desc1: Skills & Ingredient Discovery: Themed events challenge you to cook outside your comfort zone, try new ingredients, and master foreign cuisines.
community_events_course_details.benefits_desc2: Earning Profiles Badges: Completing challenges awards you digital badges that display on your public profile, recognizing your culinary growth.
community_events_course_details.benefits_desc3: Community Connection: Share your recipes, get inspired by fellow home chefs, participate in public voting, and give/receive peer feedback.
community_events_course_details.mechanics_desc1: Tie-breaker Rules: When voting sessions close and result in a tie, Jorbites uses the total number of likes on the competing recipes as the tie-breaker to determine the final winner.
community_events_course_details.mechanics_desc2: Support & Contact: If you complete a Weekly Challenge and the badge is not assigned automatically to your profile, or if you need any event assistance, contact Jorbites administrators via Instagram Direct Message (DM) or official email.
community_events_course_details.final_test_description: Test your knowledge with 10 multiple-choice questions. You need at least 80% (8 correct answers) to pass and receive the Community Events Certificate.

workshops_course_details.course_description: Discover how to host workshops, manage student whitelists, request approvals, and join live cooking classes.
workshops_course_details.requirements_intro: Jorbites cooking workshops allow you to share cooking skills or learn from others. Before hosting or joining, verify these core features:
workshops_course_details.req_capacity_desc: Set a maximum participant capacity. Once full, further registrations are blocked.
workshops_course_details.req_privacy_desc: Workshops can be Public (open to all) or Private (restricted to invited users).
workshops_course_details.req_whitelist_desc: For private workshops, search and select specific Jorbites users allowed to participate.
workshops_course_details.req_prereqs_desc: Specify steps or recipes that students must complete before the session starts.
workshops_course_details.checklist_capacity: I understand that workshops automatically enforce maximum capacity limits.
workshops_course_details.checklist_privacy: I understand the difference between public and private workshops.
workshops_course_details.checklist_whitelist: I know I can restrict private workshop access to specific whitelisted users.
workshops_course_details.checklist_prereqs: I understand that I can set recipes as prerequisites for joining a workshop.
workshops_course_details.workflow_step1_desc: Go to the Workshops page and click the 'Create Workshop' button on the CTA card.
workshops_course_details.workflow_step2_desc: Define the title, description, seat capacity limits, date, and time for your cooking session.
workshops_course_details.workflow_step3_desc: Select privacy settings, whitelist specific users if private, and add any recipe prerequisites.
workshops_course_details.workflow_step4_desc: Submit your workshop. Newly created workshops require admin approval before they are published.
workshops_course_details.workflow_step5_desc: Once approved, participants will register, and you can view/manage the student roster on the details page.
workshops_course_details.whitelist_desc1: For private workshops, you can restrict access by selecting specific Jorbites users to join your session.
workshops_course_details.whitelist_desc2: Users who are whitelisted will be able to see the workshop on their dashboard and register. Public workshops are visible to the entire community.
workshops_course_details.approval_desc1: All newly created workshops require administrator review to ensure quality. Once approved, the workshop is published and users can register.
workshops_course_details.approval_desc2: The host can view the participant roster and accept or decline join requests manually. If a workshop reaches maximum capacity, it is automatically marked as full.
workshops_course_details.final_test_description: Test your knowledge with 5 multiple-choice questions. You need at least 80% (4 correct answers) to pass and receive the Workshops Certificate.

course_quests_desc: Learn how to request recipes, fulfill community quests, link recipes to open requests, and earn badges.

quests_course_details.course_description: Learn how to request recipes, fulfill community quests, link recipes to open requests, and earn badges.
quests_course_details.requirements_intro: Jorbites quests allow the community to ask for recipes and other chefs to fulfill them. Before participating, review these basics:
quests_course_details.req_open_desc: Any user can create an open quest requesting a recipe (e.g. 'Gluten-Free Chocolate Cake').
quests_course_details.req_fulfill_desc: Chefs can fulfill quests by uploading a recipe and linking it to the quest request.
quests_course_details.req_status_desc: Quests transition from Open to In Progress (suggested recipes) and Completed (accepted solution).
quests_course_details.req_likes_desc: Users can like quests to show interest. More likes indicate higher community demand.
quests_course_details.checklist_open: I understand that any user can request a recipe by opening a quest.
quests_course_details.checklist_fulfill: I know I can fulfill quests by linking my cooking recipes to them.
quests_course_details.checklist_status: I understand how quest statuses transition from Open to Completed.
quests_course_details.checklist_likes: I know that liking quests shows community demand for a recipe.
quests_course_details.workflow_step1_desc: Click 'Request Recipe', fill in the title/description of what you want, and post it to the board.
quests_course_details.workflow_step2_desc: Other chefs browse the board to find recipes they can cook to fulfill open requests.
quests_course_details.workflow_step3_desc: If you have a matching recipe, click 'Link Recipe' on the quest page to suggest it as a solution.
quests_course_details.workflow_step4_desc: The quest host reviews suggestions and accepts the best recipe, marking the quest as Completed.
quests_course_details.workflow_step5_desc: Fulfilling quests and getting accepted awards reputation points and profile badges.
quests_course_details.linking_desc1: To fulfill a quest, click into the specific quest details and use the 'Link Recipe' option. You can search your published recipes and select the one that matches the request.
quests_course_details.linking_desc2: Once linked, the quest status changes to In Progress, and the host is notified to review your cooking guide.
quests_course_details.status_desc1: Only the quest creator (host) can accept a linked recipe to close the quest. Accepting a recipe automatically transitions the quest status to Completed.
quests_course_details.status_desc2: Completed quests remain visible in the archive, allowing the entire community to view and cook the successful recipes.
quests_course_details.final_test_description: Test your knowledge with 5 multiple-choice questions. You need at least 80% (4 correct answers) to pass and receive the Quests Certificate.

recipe_book_course_details.course_description: Learn how to customize image displays, toggle extra images, select recipes, and compile a custom recipe book PDF.
recipe_book_course_details.requirements_intro: Jorbites recipe books allow you to export selected recipes into a beautiful PDF. Before building your book, verify these core capabilities:
recipe_book_course_details.req_styles_desc: Configure recipe image display position (Random, Top/Bottom Left/Right) and toggle extra step images or cover avatar.
recipe_book_course_details.req_selection_desc: Select exactly which recipes to include in the book by toggling checkmarks in the selection grid.
recipe_book_course_details.req_limits_desc: To ensure fast rendering, there are rate limits and recommended recipe count bounds per book.
recipe_book_course_details.req_download_desc: The PDF builds dynamically in the browser, allowing you to save it directly to your device.
recipe_book_course_details.checklist_styles: I understand how to configure image display layouts and toggles.
recipe_book_course_details.checklist_selection: I know I can customize the recipe contents by checking items in the selection tab.
recipe_book_course_details.checklist_limits: I understand the limits on the number of recipes per export.
recipe_book_course_details.checklist_download: I know the final compiled recipe book is downloaded directly to my device.
recipe_book_course_details.workflow_step1_desc: Click 'Export Recipe Book' on a profile page to open the configuration modal.
recipe_book_course_details.workflow_step2_desc: Select the recipe image display alignment and toggle extra images or cover chef avatar options.
recipe_book_course_details.workflow_step3_desc: Navigate to the selection step and toggle the recipes you want to include.
recipe_book_course_details.workflow_step4_desc: Click the compile button to render the PDF file in the background.
recipe_book_course_details.workflow_step5_desc: Once ready, click to save and download the generated PDF to your machine.
recipe_book_course_details.styles_desc1: The configuration step allows you to select from five distinct recipe image display placements: 'Random', 'Top Left', 'Top Right', 'Bottom Left', and 'Bottom Right'.
recipe_book_course_details.styles_desc2: You can also control details display: toggle 'Display extra images' to show recipe step images, or 'Display user image on cover' to add the chef profile photo to the front page.
recipe_book_course_details.selection_desc1: The selection step lists all recipes matching your current profile context. Check the boxes next to the recipes you wish to export into your PDF.
recipe_book_course_details.selection_desc2: Please note that recipe book generation is subject to rate-limiting to prevent server overload. Make sure to review your selection before building.
recipe_book_course_details.final_test_description: Test your knowledge with 5 multiple-choice questions. You need at least 80% (4 correct answers) to pass and receive the Recipe Book Builder Certificate.
